auto_approve.mechanism: Crush does not document pre-configured auto-approval for specific MCP tools

enterprise_management.mechanism: Crush does not document organization-level MCP management

env_var_expansion.mechanism: env_variable_expansion: Crush MCP configuration supports environment variable references in server env blocks

marketplace.mechanism: Crush does not have an in-app MCP marketplace

oauth_support.mechanism: Crush MCP does not document OAuth 2.0 authentication for remote servers

resource_referencing.mechanism: MCP resource referencing (as distinct from tool calls) not documented in Crush

tool_filtering.mechanism: Per-server tool allow/block list not documented in the Crush MCP schema

transport_types.mechanism: transport_types: Crush documents stdio, http, and sse transports in its JSON schema for MCP server configuration

providerExtensions.name: Three transport mechanisms
providerExtensions.summary: Supports stdio, http, and sse transports for MCP server connections, configured via the mcp key in crush.json.

providerExtensions.name: Unified crush.json config file
providerExtensions.summary: MCP servers, tools, permissions, and model settings all share a single crush.json config file rather than being split across multiple settings files.
